articles.title: Strike A POSE
articles.author: Sophia Miranda
articles.dek: Prom Fashion Show Takes the Runway
articles.body:
With prom season upon us, our senior class has thought of a great way to sneak what the prom fashion show will look like this year. With the prom theme this year being “Under The Sea,” we decided the prom fashion show is to show off our beautiful and handsome senior class dressed up in their prom attire. With their beautiful dresses and suits, we are sure to be in for a for a high fashion prom. The light and music set up, simulates a real fashion show, one might see in the lower East Side. Coordinated by our senior cabinet committee, Senior Class President Ivy Chiem said, “It gave me a different perspective on how seniors feel about prom and how this show excited the senior class to want to go to prom and it was very heartwarming to hear and a positive comment about our show and the as a cabinet committee were very pleased with the positive feedback from everyone.” With the show happening so early, well the senior class is contributed to making a great experience for the seniors to excite them for their special night.

Senior Eva Murozoki said, “I think the show went very well, and had a great turn out and we were so happy to have so many people involved.”

“Excitement for prom is through the roof, and it’s sure to deliver.

articles.title: Educate: Not Just an Afterschool Program
articles.author: Megan Nim
articles.dek: More Than Makeup: Inside Lincoln's Glam Club
articles.body:
Looking for a place to hang out, have fun, and learn new skills after school? Educare is a multifaceted after-school program that offers various exciting and engaging classes to help students have fun, and explore new interests. For the past 10 years, the organization has offered academic enrichment and career exploration for students.

This year’s programs consist of two-hour lessons in subjects such as coding, theater, variety of clubs and programs, including fitness and sports (body conditioning, fitness center, dance, basketball, soccer, football, chess, and theater), art (ceramics, drawing, painting, digital art club, music club, the glam room), and hobby clubs (Compassion in Action, Theater tech, robotics club, and photography). Students can choose from any club they desire and have the freedom to pick any classes they would like.

Christopher Garcia, an 11th grade student who is a part of the cooking club said, “I love cooking, and I love the environment.”

Helen Flores, a 11th grade student who is a part of the math club said, “I enjoy studying with friends and learning new things. By my classmates, my friends and I enjoy a space where we can truly be themselves.”

articles.title: More Than Makeup: Inside Lincoln's Glam Club
articles.author: Aracely Rodriguez
articles.dek: At Lincoln High School, students interested in beauty and cosmetology have found a second home inside Lincoln’s Glam Club.
articles.body:
At Lincoln High School, students interested in beauty and cosmetology have found a second home inside Lincoln’s Glam Club. This club provides an outlet for students to explore the beauty industry while developing practical skills and self-confidence. With a strong focus on hands-on learning, students are taught to master techniques and styles that go beyond what is typically offered in a regular classroom. Glam Club encompasses a variety of activities, from practicing complex makeup applications for stage and film to creating intricate nail art and experimenting with different hairstyles.

Practice sessions often include demonstrations and workshops led by experienced members or guest artists. Members are taught to improve their techniques, such as proper lip liner, and applying lipstick, giving them the opportunity to practice and refine their skills.

Students have the chance to showcase their talent and creativity at school events, such as the annual talent show. “My favorite part of the club is that I can learn from and share with my friends,” said club member Emily Chen. “We all have a passion for makeup and beauty, and it’s so fun to share that with others.”

Activities such as learning nail techniques, creating lip gloss, and practicing makeup allows students to build confidence and explore their creativity.

Members are given the opportunity to participate in fashion shows and photo shoots, which is where they get to try out new skills and experiment with their newfound talents. Other events include makeup demonstrations and workshops, where students learn how to create professional looks for various occasions.

The Glam Club meets twice a week, with one meeting dedicated to learning new techniques and the other focused on practicing skills and creating looks. Members are encouraged to share their own tips and tricks, and to help one another improve.

The Glam Club has made a positive impact on the school community. Allowing students to express themselves and make relationships outside of school. The club not only provides an outlet for creative expression but also promotes teamwork and community building.

By embracing diversity and inclusivity, the club has created a safe and supportive environment for all students to learn and grow. Through hands-on experiences, supportive mentorship, and a strong sense of community, the Glam Club has empowered its members to build confidence, explore their passions, and develop a lifelong love for beauty and cosmetology.

articles.title: PI Day—A Never-Ending Joy to the Math-Minded
articles.author: Jada Guevara
articles.dek: On March 14th, to celebrate Pi Day, Ms. Planas a competition to see who could count the most digits of Pi.
articles.body:
On March 14th, to celebrate Pi Day, Ms. Planas a competition to see who could count the most digits of Pi. The winner, sophomore, Sarah Kim, who won first place with 30 digits. Ms. Planas will be providing the top 5 students with the correct digits a pie of their own. “I wanted to give my students a reason to be excited about Pi Day,” said Ms. Planas. “And give them a chance to see how much they could challenge themselves.”

For students to be able to participate, they must count the digits of Pi in order. The winner will be the student who accurately recited the most digits. The purpose of the competition was to celebrate Pi day and see how many digits of Pi the students could memorize.

“I didn’t think I would be able to memorize so many digits,” said Kim. “But I was determined to try my best and was surprised that I could do it.”

The first six digits of Pi are 3.14159. The number Pi is a mathematical constant, representing the ratio of a circle's circumference to its diameter. It is a non-repeating, non-terminating decimal, meaning its digits go on forever without repeating.

articles.title: S.P.A.R.K Club
articles.author: Katherine Jimenez
articles.dek: Students Paving a Road to Knowledge
articles.body:
Your future is a highway, but knowledge is the pavement. Start building your road today with S.P.A.R.K. Club. S.P.A.R.K., which stands for Students Paving a Road to Knowledge, is a club dedicated to social causes and social justice. This club provides students with a chance to learn about social justice issues and to make a difference in their community.

S.P.A.R.K. club, run by Ms. Kristensen and Gabriel Hernandez, is a mentoring program for students who are interested in learning about social justice. The club meets once a week, where students learn about different social justice issues, and discuss ways to make a difference. The club also takes part in community service projects, such as volunteering at local shelters and participating in protests.

“I’m really excited about this club,” said club member, Mia Chen. “I think it’s a great opportunity for students to learn about social justice and to make a difference in their community.”

The S.P.A.R.K. Club is a great way for students to get involved in their community and to make a difference in the world. The club is open to all students, and there is no cost to join. The club meets once a week, and the meetings are open to all students.

“It’s a good club to join for students who need help with college related things,” said club member, Maria Rodriguez.

This year, the club is working on a project to raise awareness about the importance of voting. The club is organizing a voter registration drive, and is also creating a campaign to encourage students to vote. The club is also working on a project to raise awareness about the importance of environmental protection. The club is organizing a beach cleanup, and is also creating a campaign to encourage students to recycle.

The S.P.A.R.K. Club is a great way for students to get involved in their community and to make a difference in the world. The club is open to all students, and there is no cost to join. The club meets once a week, and the meetings are open to all students.

“It’s a great opportunity for students to learn about social justice and to make a difference in their community,” said Chen.

articles.title: Pet Peeves at School
articles.author: Samantha Ortiz
articles.dek: A pet peeve refers to an annoying behavior or action that one finds irritating more than others.
articles.body:
A pet peeve refers to an annoying behavior or action that one finds irritating more than others. According to psychology today, a pet peeve is a phrase that is used to describe a “possibility that what started as a small minor annoyance is now an annoyance.”

People can be annoyed by the same behavior, because of the fact that different behaviors that may not be pleased with. A student in particular may find that their biggest pet peeve is when other students act like they are better than them. This has caused them to be annoyed because others “blocks their path to class” and sometimes it becomes the biggest annoyance to them.

Based on a survey, conducted by certain percentage of students agreed with this behavior as their biggest pet peeve. Following behind this is the annoying behavior of students who talk loudly during class. This is not only rude but also disruptive. Another behavior that students were particularly annoyed with was students who play loud music on their headphones and can be heard throughout the room. Another is students who are constantly on their phones, causing a disturbance to the class.

In the end, pet peeves reveal how small annoyances can reflect deeper social expectations. The students’ responses indicate a number of behaviors that students find annoying. These behaviors can simplify to effective and school effective culture.

articles.title: Xbox To Be “Sunsetted” After 24 Years
articles.author: Yew Yu
articles.dek: The gaming industry is gaming, Microsoft is widely considered to be one of the most well known gaming console companies…
articles.body:
The gaming industry is gaming, Microsoft is widely considered to be one of the most well known gaming console companies in the world, having produced multiple generational consoles like the Xbox. The company is projected to release its new Xbox Series X and S consoles in November, however, its appeal was slowly fading toward the mid-2020s.

Microsoft announced in a press conference on Feb. 26, 2024, that it has plans to sunset the Xbox brand by 2025, in favor of a new platform expected to launch in 2026. This new platform will be called the “next-gen” console, and it will feature higher resolutions, faster loading times, and a more immersive gaming experience.

Xbox’s latest sales, however, were not as high as anticipated, falling short of expectations. The company released the original Xbox in November 2001, and it quickly became a major player in the gaming industry. The Xbox 360, released in 2005, was even more successful, selling over 85 million units worldwide. However, the Xbox One, released in 2013, has not been as successful, selling only 60 million units worldwide.

The company has been facing stiff competition from Sony's PlayStation consoles, which have been consistently outselling the Xbox. The PlayStation 5, released in November 2020, has already sold over 20 million units worldwide. The Xbox Series X and S consoles, released in November 2020, have sold only 15 million units worldwide.

Microsoft has been trying to compete with the PlayStation consoles by releasing new games and features for its Xbox consoles. The company has also been trying to attract new customers by offering discounts and promotions. However, these efforts have not been enough to turn the tide. The company is now looking to the future, and it is hoping that its new “next-gen” console will be a success.

This new platform is expected to be a major leap forward in gaming technology, with features such as ray tracing, 4K resolution, and faster loading times. It is also expected to be more immersive, with features such as haptic feedback and 3D audio. The company is also hoping to attract a new generation of gamers with its new console.

The company has been struggling to keep up with the competition from Sony's PlayStation consoles. The PlayStation 5 has been a major success, and it has been outselling the Xbox Series X and S consoles. The company is now looking to the future, and it is hoping that its new “next-gen” console will be a success.

Microsoft is still committed to the gaming industry, and it is hoping that its new “next-gen” console will be a success. The company is also committed to providing its customers with the best possible gaming experience.

articles.title: BTS' ARI:RANG: Some Hits but Mostly Misses
articles.author: Miranda Garcia
articles.dek: BTS, a South Korean K-pop band had a comeback on March 20, 2024 after not playing with all members for a little over two years.
articles.body:
BTS, a South Korean K-pop band had a comeback on March 20, 2024 after not playing with all members for a little over two years. Back in 2025, the group enlisted in the military, causing an absence due to the military service that is required in South Korea. The group’s return has all 7 members back and in attendance for the first time since 2025, as they enlist in the military to complete their service requirements. Although there were many speculations that the group was not going to be able to make a comeback this year, there was also some controversy because of the fact that there were no “hits” by BTS as many on the internet have said. Many articles and posts online have stated that the group’s comeback was not all that it was cracked up to be and that the songs were not all that good.

However, many fans are saying that the songs were really good and had a lot of effort put into them. The songs that were released were: “Take Two,” “Still Life,” “Promise,” and “Winter Bear.” Each song was released with a music video to accompany it. For example, “Take Two” was released with a music video that shows the members of BTS on a road trip, enjoying each other’s company. The music video for “Still Life” shows the members of BTS performing in a concert hall, and the music video for “Promise” shows the members of BTS in a studio, recording music. The music video for “Winter Bear” shows the members of BTS in a snow-covered landscape, enjoying the winter weather.

The new songs from BTS are very different from their previous songs. The group’s previous songs were very upbeat and catchy, and they were very popular with fans. The new songs are more mellow and introspective, and they are not as popular with fans. The group’s new sound is a departure from their previous music. Some fans are not happy with the new sound, and they are saying that the group has lost its way. However, other fans are saying that the new sound is a good thing, and that it shows that the group is evolving.

I personally think that the new songs are good, but they are not as good as the group’s previous songs. I think that the group should stick to its old sound. However, I also think that it is important for the group to evolve and to try new things. I think that the group should try to find a balance between its old sound and its new sound.

The group's new songs are really good, but they are not as good as the group's previous songs. I think that the group should stick to its old sound. However, I also think that it is important for the group to evolve and to try new things. I think that the group should try to find a balance between its old sound and its new sound.

“They Don't Know About Us,” which is the newest song from the group, is somewhat new to the kind of music that the group originally released. It is somewhat of a departure from the group’s usual sound, but it is still a good song. The song is very catchy, and it has a good message. I think that the song is a good addition to the group’s discography.

articles.title: Timothée Chalamet Strikes Mass Outrage!
articles.author: Miranda Garcia
articles.dek: Timothée Chalamet, a famous actor in the Hollywood scene, has caused himself a huge controversy online after his…
articles.body:
Timothée Chalamet, a famous actor in the Hollywood scene, has caused himself a huge controversy online after his comments about his past experiences with acting. He claims that he is “done with acting” and will be moving on to a new career path. This has caused a lot of fans to be upset and confused, as they were looking forward to seeing him in his upcoming movie, “Dune: Part Two.”

Chalamet’s comments have been met with a lot of backlash online, with many fans expressing their disappointment and anger. Some fans have even gone as far as to say that they will no longer be supporting his career. Chalamet has not yet responded to the backlash, but it is likely that he will address the situation in the near future.

The comments were made during an interview with Vanity Fair, where Chalamet was asked about his upcoming movie. He said that he was “done with acting” and that he was going to be moving on to a new career path. He did not specify what that career path would be, but he did say that he was excited about the opportunity.

The news of Chalamet’s retirement from acting has come as a shock to many, as he is one of the most popular young actors in Hollywood. He has starred in a number of successful movies, including “Call Me By Your Name,” “Lady Bird,” and “Little Women.” He is also set to star in the upcoming movie “Dune: Part Two.”

Chalamet’s comments have been met with a lot of backlash online, with many fans expressing their disappointment and anger. articles.title: Timothée Chalamet Has A Point
articles.author: Elsa Daily
articles.dek: Live theater is dying, and movies might be too.
articles.body:
It seems as if Timothée Chalamet, in one swift move, has become the main topic of conversation not just in the halls of Lincoln High, but across the internet. The reason for this is, of course, his recent statement about his future in acting.

In an interview with Elle Magazine, Chalamet stated that he is “done with acting,” and that he will be pursuing a career in directing instead. This statement has been met with a lot of controversy, with fans divided on whether they support his decision or not. Some fans are supportive of his decision, saying that they are excited to see what he will do as a director. Others are disappointed, saying that they will miss seeing him act.

Chalamet’s decision to step away from acting has raised questions about the future of Hollywood. With the rise of streaming services and the increasing popularity of short-form content, some people are wondering if movies and live theater are slowly dying out. Chalamet’s statement has only added fuel to the fire, with many people now debating whether or not movies and live theater are still relevant in today’s society.

In the interview, he emphasizes that he wants to keep films movie-making industry, thus putting artists out of jobs and taking away their livelihoods. He then discusses how many people find it easier to connect to movies, and not live theater. It is extremely difficult to find anyone who would prefer to watch a movie than go to a live performance. Many people find it easier to connect to movies, and not live theater.

“I am going to be doing more directing and writing. I want to be able to tell stories in a different way. I want to be able to create something that will last,” Chalamet said. He also said that he is not going to be completely abandoning acting, but that he will be taking a break from it for now.

He then goes on to discuss how many people find it easier to connect to movies, and not live theater. It is extremely difficult to find anyone who would prefer to watch a movie than go to a live performance. Many people find it easier to connect to movies, and not live theater.

It's unlikely that Chalamet will be the only actor to step away from the spotlight in favor of a behind-the-scenes role. The rise of streaming services and the increasing popularity of short-form content may also contribute to the decline of traditional Hollywood. However, the future of Hollywood is still uncertain, and it remains to be seen whether movies and live theater will continue to be relevant in the years to come.

The movie industry is in a state of flux, with the rise of streaming services and the increasing popularity of short-form content. Some people are wondering if movies and live theater are slowly dying out. Chalamet’s statement has only added fuel to the fire, with many people now debating whether or not movies and live theater are still relevant in today’s society.

articles.title: Southern California Heat Wave
articles.author: Quinn-Ji
articles.dek: Record-Breaking March Temperatures
articles.body:
Southern California experienced an “uncommonly early” heat wave, causing high temperatures in mid-March. According to the National Weather Service, in the LA area, the highest temperature on March 17th was 85 degrees Fahrenheit. This broke the previous record of 73 degrees Fahrenheit, set in 1954. The heat wave was caused by a high-pressure system that brought warm air from the desert into Southern California. The system is expected to remain in place for several days, bringing more hot weather to the region.

The heat wave is expected to bring a number of challenges to the region, including increased risk of wildfires and power outages. Residents are being advised to stay hydrated, stay indoors, and avoid strenuous activity during the hottest parts of the day. The National Weather Service has issued a heat advisory for the region, warning of the potential for heat-related illnesses.

The heat wave is also expected to have a significant impact on the region’s agriculture. The high temperatures could damage crops and reduce yields. Farmers are being advised to take measures to protect their crops from the heat, such as watering them more frequently and providing shade. The heat wave is also expected to have a significant impact on the region’s water supply. The high temperatures could increase demand for water, and could also lead to increased evaporation from reservoirs.

articles.title: US Civil Rights Leader Cesar Chavez Accused of Sexual Abuse
articles.author: Abril Martinez
articles.dek: Cesar Chavez, a prominent civil rights leader and labor organizer, has been accused of sexual abuse by multiple women.
articles.body:
Cesar Chavez, a prominent civil rights leader and labor organizer, has been accused of sexual abuse by multiple women. The accusations, which have been circulating for years, have recently gained traction following the release of a documentary that explores Chavez's personal life and activism. The documentary, titled "Cesar Chavez: A Reckoning," features interviews with several women who claim to have been sexually abused by Chavez during the 1960s and 1970s. The women, who have chosen to remain anonymous, describe a pattern of behavior that includes unwanted advances, groping, and sexual assault. They allege that Chavez used his position of power and influence to exploit and silence his victims.

The accusations have sent shockwaves through the civil rights community, sparking a debate about Chavez's legacy and his role in American history. While many acknowledge his contributions to the labor movement and his fight for farmworkers' rights, others are calling for a re-examination of his life and his impact on those who were subjected to his alleged abuse. Some argue that it is important to separate the man from his work, while others believe that the accusations tarnish his legacy and call into question his character.

articles.title: The Disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
articles.author: Sophia Miranda
articles.dek: No leads, conspiracy theories abound.
articles.body:
On the night of Feb. 24, 2024, Nancy Guthrie, a mother of six, vanished from her home in Evanston, Illinois. The 44-year-old woman was last seen by her husband, David Guthrie, at approximately 10:30 p.m. as she was tucking their youngest child into bed. When he woke up the next morning, she was gone. Her car was still in the driveway, and her purse and phone were on the kitchen counter. There was no sign of forced entry, and no indications of a struggle. The only thing that was out of place was a single, muddy footprint on the living room rug, which did not match any of the family's shoes.

The disappearance of Nancy Guthrie has baffled investigators and left her family in a state of anguish. The local police department has launched a full-scale investigation, but they have yet to find any leads. The community has rallied around the Guthrie family, organizing search parties and distributing flyers with Nancy's face. However, despite their efforts, there has been no sign of her since that night.

Theories about her disappearance have ranged from foul play to voluntary departure. Some speculate that she may have been abducted, while others believe she may have chosen to leave on her own accord. The lack of evidence has only fueled these theories, leaving the family and the community in a state of uncertainty.

Adding to the mystery, there have been reports of strange occurrences in the days leading up to her disappearance. Neighbors have reported hearing unusual noises coming from the Guthrie house, and some have claimed to see flickering lights in the windows late at night. These accounts, while uncorroborated, have added a layer of intrigue to the already baffling case.

The Guthrie family has expressed their desperation for answers, pleading with the public for any information that could help them find Nancy. They have set up a website and a social media page dedicated to her case, hoping to spread awareness and solicit tips. The investigation is ongoing, and authorities are urging anyone with information to come forward.

articles.title: Key Spring 2026 Trends
articles.author: Audrie Ozuna
articles.dek: To Add to Your Life
articles.body:
The key spring 2026 trends will help you stand out from the crowd. From colorful clothes to retro accessories, there are plenty of ways to add some flair to your wardrobe. This season, it's all about expressing yourself and having fun with fashion.

One of the biggest trends for spring 2026 is vibrant colors. Think bright pinks, blues, and greens. These colors are sure to make a statement and add some personality to your outfits. You can also incorporate these colors into your accessories, such as bags and shoes.

Another trend that's been making a comeback is retro styles. Think 70s-inspired bell bottoms, 80s-inspired shoulder pads, and 90s-inspired grunge. These styles are all about embracing the past and having fun with fashion. You can find these styles at vintage stores or at your favorite clothing retailers.

Accessorizing is key this season. Think statement necklaces, chunky bracelets, and oversized sunglasses. These accessories will help you complete your look and add some personality to your outfits. You can also experiment with different hairstyles and makeup looks to further express yourself.

This season, it's all about experimenting and having fun with fashion. So, go out there and make a statement!

articles.title: 30 Years Later- Extra-Terrene Purple Line is Finally Being Extended
articles.author: Yew Yu
articles.dek: The new Metro line, known as the Purple Line, is finally being extended to the Westside.
articles.body:
The new Metro line, known as the Purple Line, is finally being extended to the Westside. The project, which began in 2014, has been plagued by delays and cost overruns. However, construction is now moving forward, and the line is expected to open in 2027.

The Purple Line extension will add six new stations to the Metro system, bringing the total number of stations to 34. The new stations will be located in the Miracle Mile, Beverly Hills, Century City, and Westwood areas. The line will also connect to the Expo Line at the Wilshire/Western station.

The Purple Line extension is expected to have a major impact on the region. It will provide much-needed transit options for residents of the Westside, and it will help to reduce traffic congestion. The line will also spur economic development in the areas that it serves.

However, the project has not been without its challenges. The cost of the extension has ballooned to over $9 billion, and construction has been delayed numerous times. Critics have also raised concerns about the environmental impact of the project.

Despite the challenges, the Purple Line extension is a major milestone for the region. It is a testament to the city's commitment to public transportation and to its vision of a more sustainable future.

articles.title: Have you heard of the Paralympics?
articles.author: The Railsplitter
articles.dek: The Paralympics are an international multi-sport event featuring athletes with a wide range of disabilities.
articles.body:
The Paralympics are an international multi-sport event featuring athletes with a wide range of disabilities. The Paralympic Games are held every four years, following the Olympic Games, and are governed by the International Paralympic Committee (IPC).

The first Paralympic Games were held in Rome in 1960. The Games featured 400 athletes from 23 countries. The Games have grown significantly since then, and now feature over 4,000 athletes from over 100 countries.

The Paralympic Games are a celebration of the human spirit and the power of sport. The Games are a chance for athletes to showcase their talents and to inspire others. The Games are also a chance for people to come together and to celebrate the diversity of the human race.

articles.title: World Cup Having Issues?
articles.author: Adrian Espinoza
articles.dek: The 2026 World Cup is poised to be a major event, but there are some issues that need to be addressed.
articles.body:
The 2026 World Cup is poised to be a major event, but there are some issues that need to be addressed. The biggest issue is the fact that the United States, Canada, and Mexico have not yet agreed on a host city for the final match. This is a major problem, as it could lead to delays in the tournament's preparation.

Another issue is the fact that the United States has not yet signed a labor agreement with its workers. This is a major problem, as it could lead to strikes and disruptions during the tournament. The FIFA World Cup is one of the most popular sporting events in the world, and it is important that it is run smoothly.

The 2026 World Cup is expected to be the biggest World Cup yet, with an expanded field of 48 teams. This means that there will be more games, and more fans, than ever before. However, it also means that there will be more challenges to overcome.

The World Cup is a major source of revenue for FIFA, and it is important that it is run smoothly. The organization has a responsibility to ensure that all of its events are run smoothly and efficiently.

The United States has a lot of work to do before the 2026 World Cup. However, if the country can overcome these challenges, then it has the potential to host a truly historic event.

articles.title: Are Video Games Losing Their Allure?
articles.author: Rebecca Medrano
articles.dek: Video games are a form of entertainment that has been around for decades.
articles.body:
Video games are a form of entertainment that has been around for decades. They have evolved significantly over the years, and they continue to be a popular pastime for people of all ages. However, some people are starting to question whether video games are losing their allure.

One of the main reasons why some people believe that video games are losing their allure is because of the rise of social media. Social media platforms like TikTok and Instagram have become so popular that they have taken away some of the attention that used to be given to video games. People are now spending more time on social media than they are on video games.

Another reason why some people believe that video games are losing their allure is because of the increasing cost of video games. Video games are becoming more and more expensive, and this is making it difficult for some people to afford them. This is especially true for young people who may not have a lot of disposable income.

The rise of mobile gaming has also had an impact on the video game industry. Mobile games are often free to play, and they are accessible to a wider audience. This has made it difficult for traditional video game companies to compete.

However, despite these challenges, video games are still a popular form of entertainment. They continue to be a way for people to connect with each other and to escape from the stresses of everyday life. The industry is constantly evolving, and it is likely that video games will continue to be a popular form of entertainment for many years to come.

articles.title: Fake News: Can You Tell the Difference?
articles.author: Jennifer Month-Hernandez
articles.dek: In today's world, it is hard to discern real information from fake news. Fake news can lead to chaos and confusion.
articles.body:
In today's world, it is hard to discern real information from fake news. Fake news can lead to chaos and confusion. The ability to distinguish real information from fake news is an important skill that everyone should have. The internet has made it easier than ever to spread fake news, and it is important to be aware of the dangers.

The rise of social media has also played a role in the spread of fake news. Fake news can be easily spread through social media platforms like Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. It is important to be critical of the information that you see on social media, and to fact-check everything before you share it.

Fake news can have serious consequences. It can lead to public panic, and it can also have a negative impact on people's lives. It is important to be aware of the dangers of fake news, and to take steps to protect yourself.

One way to protect yourself from fake news is to be a critical consumer of information. This means that you should not believe everything that you read, and you should always fact-check everything before you share it.

Another way to protect yourself from fake news is to be aware of the sources of information. This means that you should only get your information from reputable sources. If you are not sure whether a source is reputable, then you should do some research to find out.

Fake news is a serious problem, and it is important to take steps to protect yourself. By being a critical consumer of information and by being aware of the sources of information, you can help to protect yourself from fake news.

articles.title: World Baseball Classic
articles.author: Ruby Campos
articles.dek: Team USA loses 3-2 in a dramatic final in Miami.
articles.body:
Venezuela has won the first-ever World Baseball Classic (WBC) title in 2026, defeating Team USA 3-2 in a dramatic final in Miami. The title is Venezuela's first in the WBC, and it marks a significant achievement for the country's baseball program.

The game was a closely contested affair, with both teams trading blows throughout the night. Venezuela took an early lead in the third inning, but the USA battled back to tie the game in the fifth.

The game remained tied until the bottom of the ninth inning, when Venezuela's Jose Altuve hit a walk-off home run to give his team the victory. The crowd erupted in cheers as Venezuela celebrated their historic win.

The WBC is a tournament that features national teams from around the world. It is considered to be the premier international baseball competition, and it draws some of the best players in the world.

The tournament is held every four years, and it is a chance for countries to showcase their baseball talent and to compete for international bragging rights.

The USA team fought hard, but they were ultimately unable to overcome Venezuela's strong offense. However, they can hold their heads high knowing that they represented their country with pride.

articles.author: The Railsplitter
articles.dek: After a blowout in their previous game against Marquez, Lincoln turned things around in their game against the same team, winning 5-4.
articles.body:
After a blowout in their previous game against Marquez, Lincoln turned things around in their game against the same team, winning 5-4. The Tigers took the lead late in the game and held on for the victory.

The Tigers fell just short of a shutout in their previous game against Marquez, losing 4-1. However, they came back with a vengeance this time around, and they were able to secure a hard-fought victory.

The Tigers got on the board first in the bottom of the second inning when Sarah Rodriguez hit a solo home run. Marquez tied the game in the third inning with a run of their own. The two teams then traded runs in the fourth and fifth innings, respectively.

The game remained tied at 4-4 in the bottom of the seventh inning. With one out, Rodriguez stepped up to the plate and hit a walk-off single to give the Tigers the victory. The crowd erupted in cheers as Lincoln celebrated their hard-fought win.

The Tigers improved their record to 5-2 on the season with the win. They will be back in action next week when they take on the Fremont Firebirds.

Lincoln bounced back after a loss on the road last Friday to Fremont. They blew past the Santee Falcons at home on Tuesday, winning 10-0. "We played really well today, I felt like we really hit our stride," said team captain and pitcher Paul Martinez.

articles.title: Elsa's Take 5 and Watch: Three Wildly Absurd Films to Check Out
articles.author: The Railsplitter
articles.dek: Five years ago five cheerleaders died horribly in three different incidents. Monica is sisters with one of the girls who died and is seeking revenge.
articles.body:
Five years ago five cheerleaders died horribly in three different incidents. Monica is sisters with one of the girls who died and is seeking revenge. She also wants to know what happened to her sister. So she asks, "Who killed her?" Really? Will it be the obvious, or someone who was completely unexpected? The book doesn't give you much to go on, but it does give you something to make you think.

articles.title: Wake Up Dead Man
articles.author: The Railsplitter
articles.dek: The third installment of director Rian Johnson's "whodunit-mystery" series - "Wake Up Dead Man" - is set to be released on Netflix.
articles.body:
The third installment of director Rian Johnson's "whodunit-mystery" series - "Wake Up Dead Man" - is set to be released on Netflix. It stars Daniel Craig as Benoit Blanc, this time probing a murder mystery at a private island estate. But this time, he is not alone. He has brought along his two trusty detectives, who he has trained himself.
